Module com.hack23.cia.web

Package com.hack23.cia.web.impl.ui.application.views.common.constants

package com.hack23.cia.web.impl.ui.application.views.common.constants
Common constants used across views. This package contains interface constants that are shared between multiple view packages to avoid circular dependencies.
